name: Cranberry Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 2 cups water, 1 cup sugar, 1/2 cup cider vinegar in a large pot.
2. Add chopped onion, minced garlic, cinnamon, allspice, cayenne to the pot.
3. Cook until onions are translucent and fragrant.
4. Add pitted and chopped dates, currants, brown sugar, crystallized ginger, and almond slivers.
5. Stir everything together well.
6. Simmer for 20-30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Allow mixture to cool before using or storing in an airtight container.
